custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: Building the Future of U.S. Pharmaceutical Manufacturing

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Through our investments in people, facilities and technology, AbbVie is creating jobs and making a lasting commitment to communities across the U.S.

teaser.description:
AbbVie’s investments in U.S. manufacturing go beyond building a new facility. They represent the start of a long-term partnership with communities and people to make a remarkable impact on the lives of our patients and build our future together.

With a presence in all 50 states and Puerto Rico, AbbVie employs approximately 29,000 people across the United States, including more than 6,000 at its U.S. manufacturing campuses. Our investment in U.S. manufacturing is a commitment to building the facilities, developing the workforce and integrating the technologies needed to deliver life-changing medicines — now and for decades to come.
teaser.name: Teaser
teaser.title:
New Facilities.
New Technologies. New Possibilities for Patients.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: To U.S. R&D and capital investments, including manufacturing, over the next decade

cta.aria-label: Learn more Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

cta.aria-label: Learn more Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

quote.attributionRole: Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer
quote.name: Quote
quote.quotation: By strengthening our U.S. manufacturing capabilities, we are well-positioned to support our investment in innovation and enhance our ability to deliver next-generation medicines to patients.

cta.linkText: Read more about our economic impact
cta.name: Cta

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Durham, North Carolina

This 185-acre campus in Durham, North Carolina, is AbbVie's largest-ever capital investment. It will support the production of immunology, neuroscience and oncology medicines and create 734 new jobs.

cta.aria-label: Read the press release in North Carolina Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

cta_500773371.aria-label: Download the Fact Sheet Opens in same window
cta_500773371.name: Cta

cta_1499413576.aria-label: join our North Carolina talent community Opens in same window
cta_1499413576.linkText: Join Our North Carolina Talent Community
cta_1499413576.name: Cta

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
North Chicago, Illinois

Three new active pharmaceutical ingredient (API) pharmaceutical facilities in North Chicago, Illinois, will support next-generation medicines and create 300 new jobs in AbbVie's hometown.

cta.aria-label: Read the press release in Chicago, Illinois Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

cta_500773371.aria-label: Download the Fact Sheet Opens in same window
cta_500773371.name: Cta

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Worcester, Massachusetts

An expansion of AbbVie's Bioresearch Center in Worcester, Massachusetts, will grow domestic biologics manufacturing capacity and enable the transfer of select oncology products from Europe to the U.S.

cta.aria-label: Learn about our investments in Massachusetts Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

cta_500773371.aria-label: Download the Fact Sheet Opens in same window
cta_500773371.name: Cta

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Tempe, Arizona

AbbVie is acquiring and modernizing a device manufacturing facility in Tempe, Arizona, to expand drug delivery device capabilities for immunology and neuroscience medicines. This will create more than 200 new jobs.

cta.aria-label: Learn about our investments in Massachusetts Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: AbbVie's expanding U.S. Operations network is creating tech-forward careers with real opportunities for professional development and long-term growth. Find where you fit in.

cta.aria-label: WHO WE ARE Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

cta_678647839.aria-label: join our North Carolina talent community Opens in same window
